text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Our sauna endurance showdown yesterday was so
intense!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I was confident in my skills, but I never
anticipated such a long battle.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
We gotta do it again! I bet sauna training is great
for racing in the summer!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Undoubtedly. The thought of a pre-race contest
is also quite invigorating.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I must say though, I was surprised that you didn't
use the cold water bath afterward.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
After going through all that trouble, I couldn't
just throw that heat away! Never let yourself cool
down!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: The flame of the heart burns eternal!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I-I see now... But take care not to collapse from
heat exhaustion.
